mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where your sense of entitlement meets its match!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I waltz into a fancy restaurant, looking sharper than a diamond in a tuxedo. I ask for a table for one, and the hostess has the audacity to tell me there's a waitlist! Can you believe it? Me? Wait? I demand to speak to the manager, of course. He comes over, all flustered, and I give him a piece of my mind, telling him how I'm a VIP and should never have to wait for anything. Long story short, I not only get seated immediately but also receive a free bottle of their finest champagne as an apology. That's the power of entitlement, my friends. Always assert yourself, and you'll get what you deserve-everything.
